segment.source: Explains everything this user can currently do and why — not scoped to a single resource (the underlying endpoint accepts a resource filter but always returns the full trace).
Pick a user to see their effective permissions
This user has no effective permissions
Sessions can only be listed per user — there is no view of every active session across the firm at once.
Choose a user above to view their sessions.
This user has no recorded sessions.
No matching login attempts were found.

Shows settings and payment-gateway changes only — a system-wide audit log covering every entity in the app isn't available yet. There's no filtering by actor or date, and IP/User Agent aren't included in this feed.
No settings or gateway changes matched this filter.
Create a branch to scope users, numbering series, and invoicing details by office.
Create a department to organize users by function.
Public provider fields — e.g. publishable/API key, account ID.
Only sent if rotating — leave blank to keep the saved secret.
Create a series to control how document numbers are generated.
There is no logo upload or portal-branding endpoint — logos are plain URLs you host elsewhere.
This only controls the tenant-level default — per-user theme override storage doesn't exist yet even when this toggle is enabled.
Leave blank to keep the currently saved password.
Leave blank to keep the currently saved token.
Leave blank to keep the currently saved token.
"Sync templates" is a live verification round-trip with WhatsApp — it doesn't persist a local template catalog.
Open object — shape isn't enforced server-side.
Import hub, tenant data export, and backup status don't exist yet — this section only covers retention and legal hold.
There is no IP address list field — this is a single enforcement toggle only.
Create a tax rate to use on invoices and quotes.
Create a team to group users for assignment and workload views.
No unresolved assignments — this user can be deactivated immediately.
This user has unresolved assignment that must be reassigned before deactivation:
Why can this user do X? (effective-permission inspector)
Write-only — the server never returns current preferences, so this sets new ones rather than editing existing ones.
Fields are dot-paths into the trigger's own event payload (e.g. lead.stage) — there's no related-entity lookup or business-hours predicate.
Only the "status" field is honored server-side.
Least-loaded only — there is no round-robin mode.
Runs this rule once against a sample payload you supply — there's no persistent log-only simulation mode server-side, only this one-shot test.
No authority found for this question.
Every AI output here is labeled AI-generated and requires an explicit Save/Insert action — nothing an AI feature produces is applied automatically.
Chat with the assistant from the floating dock in the bottom-right corner.
Clause extraction and risk flags for an existing document.
Guided intake to generate a notice or agreement draft.
Ask a question and get a cited answer from the firm's knowledge base.
Reviews an already-uploaded document — there's no upload-in-place here; upload the contract via Documents first if it isn't already saved.
There's no tracked-changes redline docx output or configurable firm playbook — this is a plain clause extraction with LLM-judged risk levels, not a rules-engine result.
Save review notes as new document version
"Load matter parties" is a frontend convenience that fetches the matter's client name — the AI draft endpoint itself does not auto-fill parties from the matter.
There's no per-section regenerate — "Regenerate" re-runs the whole draft. This text box is editable before saving.
Web-grounded mode is accepted by the API but doesn't currently change retrieval — research always draws from the firm's own Acts/Judgments/Articles either way.
The assistant could not find a verifiable citation for this question.
Set a password to activate your account
This invitation link is missing its token. Ask your administrator to resend it.
Your account is active. You can now sign in.
Password must be at least 10 characters.
You don't have permission to view this page. Request access from your administrator.
We'll email you a reset link
If an account matching those details exists, we've sent a password-reset link to that email address. It expires in 30 minutes.
Sign in to your LexFlow workspace
This reset link is missing its token. Request a new one from the sign-in page.
Your password has been reset. You can now sign in.
Password must be at least 10 characters.
Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app
Buckets sum to — matches total (AC-B6 ✓) — does NOT match total ()
Generating drafts — this can take up to a minute for large batches.
Click Generate on the previous step to run the batch.
WIP detail isn't available here yet
There's no dedicated unbilled-time/expense listing endpoint. Check a matter's Financial Summary tab for its current WIP total, or use Batch bill to invoice everything above a WIP threshold.
Payment history isn't listable in aggregate yet
There's no aggregate payments-list endpoint. Open a client's Statement (search below) to see their payment history.
Credit notes aren't listable in aggregate yet
There's no aggregate credit-notes endpoint. Issue one from an invoice's row action; it applies against that invoice directly.
Cannot exceed the invoice grand total.
On account (skip the ≤ allocations check for excess/unallocated amounts)
There's no endpoint to list a client's open invoices, so invoice ids are entered manually here.
Cannot exceed the original payment amount.
No WIP picker exists yet — paste IDs from the Time module manually.
Save the invoice to generate a PDF preview.
There is no separate auto-match endpoint — submitting compares these lines against the trust ledger server-side and returns the balanced/exception result directly.
Pick a date range and refresh.
Trust ledger entries are append-only (DB trigger blocks UPDATE/DELETE per AC-B7) — there is no edit action. Corrections are made only via a reversing entry.
"" repeats. What would you like to reschedule?
Locked — edit from its source module
Subscribe to this read-only URL from any calendar app to see your LexFlow events. Anyone with this link can view your calendar — treat it like a password and regenerate it if it leaks.

These defaults aren't applied server-side yet — only per-event reminder overrides exist on the backend today. What you set here is staged locally in this browser pending a real reminder-policy API; add a matching per-event reminder in the event dialog for it to actually dispatch.
Fire at a fixed local time instead of the event's own start time (e.g. same-day 07:00 court-local)
Connection status isn't available yet — this panel can only start a new connection. Account management (disconnect, resync) will appear here once the backend exposes an accounts-listing endpoint.
No account is known to be connected client-side (no accounts-listing endpoint exists yet), so there is no accountId to disconnect.
Controls how much detail external busy blocks show inside LexFlow. This choice is saved in this browser only — no backend field exists yet to store it per account.
At least one of phone or email is required.
You'll upload the actual identity document files after the client is created — this step just lets you plan out which documents are expected.
Corporate clients need at least one contact person before continuing.
Portal access requires the client to have a verified email — skip this if no email was provided in Basic.
The Legal module isn't built in this environment yet, so matter details can't be listed here.
The Billing module isn't built in this environment yet.
The Documents module isn't built in this environment yet.
The Contracts module isn't built in this environment yet.
No shared notes API exists in this environment yet.
Something went wrong while loading contact persons.
Something went wrong while loading KYC documents.
Find the duplicate record to merge into .
Which record should survive the merge? The other will be tombstoned.
Pick which value to keep for each field that differs.
Portal access is off for this client.
Something went wrong while loading portal users.
Family members, corporate group links, and referrers show up here.
Try adjusting or clearing your filters.
Places a real call via the firm's configured Twilio Voice number. Recording only happens if consent is given below — the Twilio API call itself is gated on it.
Pick a client to see call history
No calls logged for this client yet
Pick a channel to start chatting.
Step 1: choose a provider and get an authorization link.
Step 2: open the link below, authorize LexFlow, then paste the code value from the redirect URL here.
No known mailboxes — connect one first.
Merge preview (this is exactly what will be sent):
Pick a client to see SMS history
No SMS messages for this client yet
warning Freeform sends may be rejected: DLT enforcement is on by default for this tenant, and a message without a template is usually rejected with "DLT template required."
Merge preview (local mirror — the server does its own substitution):
Pick a client to see WhatsApp history
No WhatsApp messages for this client yet
Session window closed — send a template message instead
Template sends require an active opt-in and are usable any time.
Merge preview (local mirror — the server does its own substitution):
Only usable while the 24h session window is open
warning No open session window — freeform session messages aren't allowed. Use a template above.
Live updates paused — refreshing periodically instead.
No widgets are visible. Use "Customize" to add some.
No performance data for this period
Upload a file above to create the first version.
There is no document-activity endpoint on the backend yet, so per-view/download/print history can't be shown here. This is a confirmed backend gap, not a bug.
There is no publish/unpublish toggle endpoint yet, so this reflects the current value read-only. Use "Manage sharing" for external links.
Privileged documents cannot get external share links.
Only links created in this session are shown here — there is no endpoint to list previously created links.

Internal user/team permissions aren't available yet. The database has a `document_permissions` table, but no confirmed backend endpoint exposes it, so this dialog can't offer a real Viewer/Editor assignment form here.
There is no confirmed "publish to portal" toggle endpoint yet, so this value is shown read-only rather than editable.
Search matters by number or title…
Something went wrong loading the template library.
Firm template library is empty. Ask an admin to add merge templates.
No version of this section was in force on that date.
Attached this session: (there's no endpoint to list tags attached in a previous session).
Publishing requires at least one tag and a reviewer who isn't the author — both are enforced by the server even if this editor's tag tracking is incomplete.
No items in this collection yet
Counts pin records, not distinct matters — pinning the same judgment twice into one matter would inflate this.
Text extraction failed for this PDF (native text-layer extraction only — not true OCR of scanned pages) — searchable by metadata only.
Matter creation isn't available in this environment yet (the Legal module hasn't shipped) — submitting with this enabled will show that error.
Billing isn't available in this environment yet (the Fin module hasn't shipped) — submitting with this enabled will show that error.
This looks similar to existing lead. Attach to one of them, or continue creating a new lead anyway.
At least one of phone or email is required.
Map each column in your file to a lead field.
.xlsx files are uploaded as-is; columns named FirstName, LastName, Company, Email, Phone, IssueSummary are detected automatically.
Capture your first lead to start the pipeline.
Try adjusting or clearing your filters.
falls on a court holiday. Nearest working day: .
Create a compliance task from this outcome
Something went wrong while loading evidence.
Something went wrong while loading hearings.
Hearing date can't be in the past.
Something went wrong while loading orders.
Order date can't be in the future.
Something went wrong while loading parties & advocates.
Something went wrong while loading witnesses.
No hearings scheduled for this date
Paste the client's ID (no client picker exists yet)
Open date can't be in the future.
I've reviewed these matches and want to proceed anyway
A reason is required to override.
Try adjusting or clearing your filters.
No running timers remain on this matter
Trust funds have been disbursed/accounted for
A closure summary note is required.
Not available in this environment yet
Something went wrong while loading the timeline.
Something went wrong while loading billing data.
Detailed invoices and line-item billing aren't available yet — the Billing module isn't fully built in this environment.
The Documents module isn't built in this environment yet.
No shared notes API exists in this environment yet.
Something went wrong while loading parties.
Task management isn't built in this environment yet.
Something went wrong while loading expenses.
Amount must be zero or more.
Time entries aren't available here yet
No matter-scoped time-entry API exists in this environment yet.
External emails aren't sent an attachment yet — no attachment-capable mail sender exists server-side.
This report contains financial data and requires the reports.financial permission.
This report is large enough to run in the background — checking every few seconds…
Run complete — rows. This ran as a background job, so results are only available via export.
Create a task to get started.
File written statement for MAT-042 by next Friday @Aditi !high
Recognizes !priority, @mention, MATTER-CODE, and today/tomorrow/next <day>/in N days
Review the fields below before creating — this preview is not submitted as-is.
No user directory access — owner can be assigned later.

LexFlow has no recurrence engine yet — this creates independent copies of this task with computed due dates. They are not linked as a series (no API field exists for that); cancelling or editing one has no effect on the others.
This task has no due date — future copies will also be created without one, spaced by creation order only.
Part of a generated series (no server-side linking).
No user directory access — assignees can't be looked up here.
Predecessors must be Done before this task can complete. No structured cycle-path is returned by the server — a rejected dependency shows its message only.
Each item's due date = this date + its relative due days.
Any (leave blank to apply to all types)
Free text — there's no fixed list of matter types server-side.

Generated tasks always get priority: Medium and an unassigned owner when this template is applied — that's hardcoded server-side and can't be set here. A mandatory item also causes the server to attach a generic checklist item ("Complete per matter template") to its generated task.
Create a template to standardize a task plan for a matter type.
No user directory access — showing raw owner IDs.
No task activity for this week
No owner has any tasks in this week's window.
Time entries submitted for approval will show up here.
No time entries match these filters
Adjust the filters above or log time from the timesheet grid.
Rounds up to min (-min increment — the server computes the final value from its own clock).
Add a matter above to start logging time.
Target hours are a placeholder assumption (8h × weekdays in range) — there is no real per-user or firm target-hours source in the backend yet. Once one exists, this calculation should be replaced.
h billable approved of h target (%)
